'''zazaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oilskin|oilskin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-z-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oilskin|oilskin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zazaka
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæzækæth|zæzækæth]] || [[word:zæzækæj|zæzækæj]] || [[word:zæzækæsh|zæzækæsh]] || [[word:zæzækæ|zæzækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zazazakath|zazazakath]] || [[word:zazazakaj|zazazakaj]] || [[word:zazazakash|zazazakash]] || [[word:zazazaka|zazazaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zazakath|zazakath]] || [[word:zazakaj|zazakaj]] || [[word:zazakash|zazakash]] || [[word:zazaka|zazaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zazafkath|zazafkath]] || [[word:zazafkaj|zazafkaj]] || [[word:zazafkash|zazafkash]] || [[word:zazafkaf|zazafkaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zazakatha|zazakatha]] || [[word:zazakaja|zazakaja]] || [[word:zazakasha|zazakasha]] || [[word:zazakaka|zazakaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zazakath|zazakath]] || [[word:zazakaj|zazakaj]] || [[word:zazakash|zazakash]] || [[word:zazaka|zazaka]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zazakathal|zazakathal]] || [[word:zazakajal|zazakajal]] || [[word:zazakashal|zazakashal]] || [[word:zazakakal|zazakakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zazakathatha|zazakathatha]] || [[word:zazakajaja|zazakajaja]] || [[word:zazakashasha|zazakashasha]] || [[word:zazakaka|zazakaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zazakathan|zazakathan]] || [[word:zazakajan|zazakajan]] || [[word:zazakashan|zazakashan]] || [[word:zazakakan|zazakakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zazakathaoro|zazakathaoro]] || [[word:zazakajaoro|zazakajaoro]] || [[word:zazakashaoro|zazakashaoro]] || [[word:zazakakaoro|zazakakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
